title: Title (Remainder incl.)
text:
4.1 Author’s Gender
Gender information is not originally included in Fennica. We enriched the data by linking author names with gender information from various sources, including the HENKO project, the Genderize dataset, manual curation and search, and additional records provided by the National Library of Finland. The full list of names and genders can be found here.
In total N = 1318056 records. After enrichment in total there are records 996414 / (75.6%) with assigned gender. There are 359512 (36.1%) female names, 636902 (63.9%) male names.

title: Title (Remainder incl.)
text:
4.1.1 Gender over Time (1600-2000)











4.1.2 Gender over Time (1809-1917)
In total N = 73042 records. After enrichment in total there are records 46533 / (63.7%) with assigned gender. There are 4555 (9.8%) female names, 41978 (90.2%) male names.











#| label = "source-index",
#| include = FALSE
source("init.R")
source("title2.R")
field <- "title2"
MARC: 245a,b
##Title and Remainder of title merged.


4.1.3 Complete Dataset Overview
Original documents with titles: r sum(!is.na(df[[field]])) / r nrow(df) (r round(100*mean(!is.na(df[[field]])), 1)%)
Original documents with missing (NA) titles r sum(is.na(df[[field]])) / r nrow(df) documents (r round(100*mean(is.na(df[[field]])), 1)%)
Unique discarded entries in original data: r as.vector(countLines(file_discarded) - 1)
Download title field harmonized dataset
Error list


4.1.4 Top-r ntop title
#| label = "summary_title2_table",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| results = "asis"
x <- top(df, "title2")
tab <- cbind(names(x), unname(x), round(100 * unname(x/nrow(df)), 1))
colnames(tab) <- c("title2", "Entries (n)", "Fraction (%)")
kable(head(tab, 20))


4.1.5 Top-r ntop title for “Language material” content type
In the Fennica dataset, language material makes up the majority of the content, comprising 91.6% of the entire dataset. This includes written texts, documents, books, articles, and any other content primarily composed of language. The remaining 8.4% consists of non-language material, such as maps, music, computer files, and other types of content that do not primarily rely on language. For a more detailed breakdown of the different types of content within the dataset, you can refer to chapter “Types of records” of this e-book.
#| label = "summary_title2_table4",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| results = "asis"

#pick melindas for language material content types
df_lang_material <- df.orig %>%
  filter(type_of_record == "Language material") %>%
  select(melinda_id)

#filter language material melindas 
df_language_mat <- df %>%
  filter(melinda_id %in% df_lang_material$melinda_id)

x <- top(df_language_mat, "title2")
tab <- cbind(names(x), unname(x), round(100 * unname(x/nrow(df)), 1))
colnames(tab) <- c("title2", "Entries (n)", "Fraction (%)")
kable(head(tab, 20))

#| label = "summary_title2_table3",
#| echo = FALSE,
#| results = "asis"

#pick melindas for language material content types
df_lang_material <- df.orig %>%
  filter(type_of_record == "Language material") %>%
  select(melinda_id)

#filter language material melindas for 1809-1917 years 
df_19_language_mat <- df_19 %>%
  filter(melinda_id %in% df_lang_material$melinda_id)

x <- top(df_19_language_mat, "title2")
tab <- cbind(names(x), unname(x), round(100 * unname(x/nrow(df_19)), 1))
colnames(tab) <- c("title2", "Entries (n)", "Fraction (%)")
kable(head(tab, 20))

title: 7  Genre 008/33
text:
7.1 Description
MARC21 field 008 contains fixed-length data elements that encode various bibliographic details. In this context, we focus specifically on books—that is, records where the Type of Record is language material. From this field, we extract and interpret the genre information as encoded in position 33 of the 008 field.
This analysis is based on 1119652 book records in the Fennica database.

title: 7  Genre 008/33
text:

Unique genre 008: 13.
There are 848 missing values in the dataset, accounting for (0.08%) of the total. Also, there 76847 “Not coded” genres in the field 008/33, accounting for (6.87%) of the total.
Unrecognized genre 088 provides details of Genre 008 that were discarded, in total: 0.
